question: How can you set quick release for a multi-use pressure cooker and air fryer?
content:
To set Quick Release, press the quick release button down until it clicks and locks in the Vent position.<PIC>
Steam will eject through the top of the steam release valve while venting; keep hands, face, and exposed skin away from the valve.<PIC>
When pressure has fully released, the float valve drops into the lid. Do not try to open the lid before the float valve has dropped.
ret: "To set Quick Release, press the quick release button down until it clicks and locks in the Vent position.<PIC>\nSteam will eject through the top of the steam release valve while venting; keep hands, face, and exposed skin away from the valve.<PIC>\nWhen pressure has fully released, the float valve drops into the lid. Do not try to open the lid before the float valve has dropped.",["multi-use_pressure_cooker_and_air_fryer_01", "multi-use_pressure_cooker_and_air_fryer_02"]
notes: Answered from the Quick Release (QR) section; included both adjacent QR illustrations because they show the Vent position and active venting.
